question: [File: 'File Name: monitor/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/monitor/health/ReleaseHealthIndicator.java -> Scope: High: Non-network-based DoS affecting projects with greater than or equal to 25% of the market capitalization on top of the respective layer'] [Function: createHelmReleaseHealth()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a permanent DoS by triggering the `.cacheInvalidateIf(v -> false)` inner cache to lock in a null or error result from `getHelmRelease()`, so that the health check never recovers even after the underlying Kubernetes resource is restored, causing the monitor to permanently report UNKNOWN and halt all downstream alerting?
